# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function sum: int (n: int)
  entry:
      STORE 0, [s]
      STORE 1, [i]
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      LOAD t1, [i]
      LOAD t2, [n]
      t3 = CMP_LE t1, t2
      JUMP_IF_NOT t3, L4
      JUMP L2
  L2:
      LOAD t4, [s]
      LOAD t5, [i]
      t6 = ADD t4, t5
      STORE t6, [s]
      JUMP L3
  L3:
      LOAD t7, [i]
      t8 = ADD t7, 1
      STORE t8, [i]
      JUMP L1
  L4:
      LOAD t9, [s]
      RETURN t9

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t10 = CALL [sum], 10
      RETURN t10
